templates.title: SQL Server 2017
templates.note: Password needs to include at least 8 characters including uppercase, lowercase letters, base-10 digits and/or non-alphanumeric symbols. Replace both bind paths with real host folders and set the published host port during deployment.

templates.title: SQL Server 2017 (Compose)
templates.name: sqlserver2017
templates.description: Microsoft SQL Server 2017 on Linux with labeled prompts for host port and a shared root folder.
templates.note: Use this template if you want labeled fields for the published host port and a shared root folder. The compose file will mount FOLDER/data and FOLDER/backup. The referenced compose file must exist on the repository default branch.

env.name: HOST_PORT
env.label: Host port
env.description: Published host port for SQL Server.

env.name: FOLDER
env.label: SQL data folder
env.description: Absolute host path used as the base folder. Portainer will mount FOLDER/data and FOLDER/backup.

env.name: SA_PASSWORD
env.label: SA password
env.description: Must meet SQL Server password complexity requirements.

templates.title: Custom Nginx with ENV Inputs (Compose)
templates.name: nginx-custom-stack
templates.description: Nginx server with configurable domain, published host port, internal listen port, and timezone.
templates.note: This stack generates a default nginx server block and a simple index page from the values entered during deployment.

env.name: SERVER_NAME
env.label: Server domain
env.description: Domain name for the nginx server block.

env.name: NGINX_PORT
env.label: Internal port
env.description: Port nginx listens on inside the container.

env.name: TZ
env.label: Timezone
env.description: Container timezone used in the generated landing page.
